overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a desert highway shoulder in a video game environment (GTA V), featuring passing vehicles, a 'Welcome to Joshua Tree' sign, and arid mountain terrain. The footage shows clear desert lighting with light traffic and natural rock formations.

events.description: white RV passes by on the right side of the highway
red van passes by on the right and drives into the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to the guardrail

notable_agents.action: white RV driving past on the highway
red van driving away down the highway

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail running along the left side of the shoulder
large roadside billboard structure on the right side of the highway
wooden utility poles with power lines stretching along the highway
hazy mountain range visible in the desert distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a desert highway shoulder with a metal guardrail on the left. A white RV and red van pass by on the right. The landscape features distant mountains and sparse desert vegetation under clear, hazy skies.

events.description: black sedan passes by quickly on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder, approaching and passing the Joshua Tree welcome sign

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past at high speed

entered.detail: large wooden arched sign reading 'Welcome to Joshua Tree' with a yellow warning sign below
large white boulder formation behind the welcome sign
wooden posts with wire fencing along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Approaching and passing the 'Welcome to Joshua Tree' sign positioned near large white rock formations on the left. The metal guardrail ends and wooden fencing begins. A black car passes by on the highway as the walk continues through the arid landscape.

events.description: white truck visible approaching in the distance on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking past the rock formations toward an intersection with a stop sign visible ahead

notable_agents.action: white truck driving toward the camera on the highway

entered.detail: wooden roofed information board structure near the rock formation
red octagonal stop sign visible at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the desert highway past the welcome sign area, with large white rock formations now further behind on the left. Approaching a wooden information kiosk and an intersection with a stop sign visible ahead. A white truck approaches in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a desert highway shoulder that transitions from an open road stretch into a marked welcome area. It begins beside a metal guardrail under hazy skies as a white RV and red van pass by, with sparse vegetation and distant mountains framing the horizon. As the camera moves forward, the guardrail gives way to wooden fencing and the scene opens up to reveal a Welcome to Joshua Tree sign positioned near towering white rock formations. The perspective then continues past these landmarks and a passing black car, shifting toward a wooden information kiosk. Finally, the walk leads toward a highway intersection where a stop sign stands ahead and a white truck approaches from the distance.
